_comment: Calibration manifest for plan-tokens.py (PLAN-065 §4.2 / CR-MF6). Ex-post costs from CHANGELOG entries + memory files. Methodology: token counts from plan budget_tokens frontmatter (self-declared post-hoc) + USD costs from session memory aggregate billing notes. See docs/PLAN-TOKENS.md for methodology details.

fixtures.description: Sprint 32 Final Closure — v1.9.0 + v1.10.0 GA, 11 items, 8 phases
fixtures.cost_source: plan §4.0 Total row (self-declared ex-post) + CHANGELOG S57 aggregate ~$75-115 USD blended. Input: 1.095M stated in plan table. Output: 590k stated. USD derived: 1.095M × $15/M + 0.59M × $75/M = $16.43 + $44.25 = $60.68 ≈ $60.7

fixtures.description: MCP Injection Scanner — C-P0-01 G4/G5/G6 close, 6 phases + soak
fixtures.cost_source: plan §4.0 Total row (fixture self-declared). Input: 520k. Output: 300k. USD derived: 0.52M × $15/M + 0.30M × $75/M = $7.80 + $22.50 = $30.30

fixtures.description: Post-v1.10.0 Security + delta audit — WebFetch injection + Round-23 burn-down
fixtures.cost_source: plan §4.0 Total row (fixture self-declared). Input: 340k. Output: 205k. USD derived: 0.34M × $15/M + 0.205M × $75/M = $5.10 + $15.375 = $20.475 ≈ $20.5

acceptance_criteria.description: Estimator output must be within ±20% of actual_input_tokens for ≥80% of fixtures (3/3 or 4/5).
